content.en:
Sixteenth dimension.

Primordial Star.

This is the deepest part of the sixteenth dimension, and the size of the Primal Star is far greater than that of the Xuanwu Star.

It can be said that the Primal Star is the largest multi-dimensional star in the sixteenth dimension, and the most valuable multi-dimensional star.

Before Ye Tian got close to the Primal Star, he already felt that his body was being torn by a force, even the supreme dimensional rules he had comprehended were very weak under this force.

"Gotta devour the fragment of that multidimensional supreme thing!"

Ye Tian crushed and swallowed the fragment of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, and the energy of the multi-dimensional supreme thing poured into his body, and his body became a hundred times tougher in a short period of time.

However, his reflexes were also much slower, and his body became slightly stiffer.

Swish!

Ye Tian continued to move forward and soon entered the range of the Primal Star, but he didn't have an uncomfortable feeling like "Nine-Five-Seven".

If he hadn't used the multidimensional supreme thing, his body would have been torn apart.

After a while, Ye Tian was very close to the Primal Star, and his body was no longer shuttling by himself, but was forcibly pulled by the Primordial Star.

At this time.

Ye Tian no longer resisted the Primal Star, but cultivated the Primordial Star Technique wholeheartedly.

Rumble!!!!

A large amount of primordial star energy poured into his primordial aperture, making his primordial aperture stronger and stronger.

Soon.

Ye Tian fell into the Primal Star.

At this time, he couldn't even move.

Now, he can only do two things, one thing is to cultivate the Primal Star Aperture, and the other thing is to comprehend the Primal Star and comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules.

Ye Tian tried to comprehend the Primal Star, and the effect was too good.

Then, while absorbing the energy of the Primal Star, he cultivated the Primal Star, and at the same time comprehended the Primal Star.

Of course, it is also possible for his external copy body to comprehend the primordial star through this copy body.

Time passed slowly, and a period of time passed.

When the energy of the multi-dimensional supreme thing in his body was about to be exhausted, his mind moved, and the fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing in the dimensional void in his body immediately shattered and merged into his body, making his body tough again, and continuing to resist the tearing power of the primordial star.

In this way, Ye Tian relied on these fragments of multi-dimensional supreme things to cultivate here.

After a thousand domain yuan years.

The fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing on Ye Tian's body had been exhausted, and this was still the fact that he had traded a little bit of the fragment of the multi-dimensional supreme thing halfway, otherwise it would not be enough.

Click!

His body began to shatter, this is the exhaustion of the energy of the multi-dimensional treasure, and the body has become ordinary, and can only be torn apart.

However.

Ye Tian was very happy, because he had already completed his cultivation of the Primal Star Aperture.

And with the help of this Thousand Domains Yuan years, he has comprehended the Primal Star, and has mastered the rules of the Nine Supreme Dimensions.

If the other Ninth Realms came over, it would be impossible to comprehend so many supreme dimensional rules, but he had been using the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the Xuanlin Mirror to deduce and analyze the comprehension, which was why he was able to progress so quickly.

Of course.

In the Ninth Realm, the Ninefold Supreme Dimension Rules are naturally nothing.

But Ye Tian's true confidence was the Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique obtained after the consummation of the Primal Star Aperture - the Primal Astrology!

The Supreme Domain Secret Technique of the Primal Astrology could not directly improve his strength, but it allowed Ye Tian to have the effect of being in the Primal Star.

Similarly, once it is cast, other powerhouses will be like entering a miniature primordial star, but other powerhouses will be suppressed by the primordial star, but he will not.

In other words, in the middle of the battle, casting the primordial astrology is equivalent to creating a favorable combat environment for oneself.

"The greatest role of the primordial astrology is to comprehend the rules of the supreme dimension!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He can even show it and let his relatives come to see it.

It can be said that the value of this Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique is too great, and it is far from being comparable to other Supreme Domain Body Secret Techniques.

With the Primal Astrology, he will not be able to use the Primordial Star to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules in the future.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian used the primordial astrology to comprehend, coupled with the assistance of multi-dimensional wisdom light and the mirror of Xuanlin, and constantly comprehended the rules of the highest dimension.

At the same time, he was also trying to create a second Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.

Unconsciously, tens of thousands of yuan years have passed........

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the second Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect - Seven Star Sword Blade!

The Seven Star Sword Blade is based on seven multi-dimensional stars with compatible attributes as a reference object, condensing the power of seven multi-dimensional stars, turning them into one, and thus bursting out.

Although the seven-star sword blade only involved the power of seven multi-dimensional stars, it was far less than the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional star powers involved in Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting.

However, the seven-star sword blade has exerted the power of the seven multi-dimensional stars to the extreme, and the attack power still surpasses Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting.

But.

He can use Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting to trap the enemy, and then secretly cast the seven-star sword blade, these two methods can complement each other, and can inflict more terrifying attacks on the enemy.

And in the past tens of thousands of domains, he has cultivated dozens of star apertures to perfection.

Now, he already possessed more than a hundred Perfection Realm Star Apertures, and his physical fitness was already extremely terrifying.

As for cultivation, he was still in the middle of the Eighth Realm, but he was very close to the late stage of the Eighth Realm.

"The Supreme Dimensional Rules have now reached the seventeenth level, and it is becoming more and more difficult to improve in the future, maybe after I break through to the ninth level, it will be easier to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, even if his cultivation reached the eighth level limit now, he was not ready to immediately attack the ninth realm, he wanted to comprehend the supreme dimensional rules to an extremely high realm, maybe he could directly break through to the ninth realm.

Or if you cultivate all the star apertures to 5.4 to the consummation realm, there may be new changes.

His strength has been improved to his current level, and he is ready to go to a multi-dimensional star that he did not dare to go to in the past-Mist Pluto.

This multi-dimensional astral body is also very special, the soul will reaches the eighth realm of the sixteenth dimension, and once it gets close, it will be killed in seconds.

However, if Ye Tian used the Supreme Dimensional Rules and Supreme Dimensional Domain Body, he might be able to weaken some of the power of the Fog Pluto, so that he would not be killed in seconds.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Fog Pluto, which was a multi-dimensional star body completely condensed by a special mist, and as soon as he got closer, a terrifying force penetrated into his body, wanting to obliterate his soul will.

Ye Tian immediately urged the Supreme Dimensional Rules and the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body to protect his soul will.
